salesexecutive_description: Website e bijnopan bechte Sales Executive niyog koro.
developer_description: Developer ra website er jonno technical component banaen.
designer_description: Designer ra website er jonno graphics component banaen.
manager_description: Manager shob karmochari niyontron koren ar speed bonus den.
leaddeveloper_description: Lead Developer upadan ek kore module toiri koren.
sysadmin_description: SysAdmin server configure korte component toiri koren.
marketer_description: Website er jonno notun user anar jonno Marketer niyog koro.
hrmanager_description: Kajer shomoy niyontron korte HR Manager niyog koro.
smallretirementplan_description: Karmochari der bhobishyot shonchoy e taka reke unnaeder bhobishyot nishchit koro.
freebeverages_description: Bina Poyshay paneey diye karmochari der shontusti baro.
freegymmembership_description: Karmochari der gym membership diye shushoshtho thakte shohayota koro.
extendedretirementplan_description: Karmochari der jiboner mojar jinisher shongge birodhito retirement plan dao.
freehealthcare_description: Karmochari der chikitsha biler khorch tumi dao.
fullretirementplan_description: Ei poriporno retirement plan karmochari der aisharo jibon dey.
paidtransportation_description: Karmochari der jatayater khorch tumi dewate unader jibon shohoj koro.
framework_description: Framework: Ek release e website e koto bisheshotto thakbe taa bare. Framework level onek bisheshotto thakte dey.
producttype_description: Website Er Dhoron: Protiti website er dhoron e alag alag audience ar user per income ache.

restart_to_take_effect: Ei poriborton kaajhe lagate game restart koro.
no_more_workstations: Aar kono khali workstation nei. Bhaban upgrade koro.
tip_multi_place: Tip: SHIFT dhore rakhle ekshongge onek item rakha jaay.
loans_description: Rin nite hobe taka shesh hoye gele. Shuder shonge shomoyomoto ferat deyo.
inventory_empty: Inventory khali. Component toiri korte developer ar designer use koro.
no_contracts_available: Ekhon kono contract nei. Contract ante Sales Executive niyog koro.
cancel_contract_confirm: Shotti ki ei contract batil korte chao? {cancellationfee} batil fee dite hobe.
select_empty_workstation: Ei karmochari rakhte khali workstation bhalo koro.
tip_speed: Speed: Ei karmochari kototai dhruto kaj koren. 100% motamoti.
name: Naam
how_change_working_hours: Kajer shomoy badlate HR Manager chai.
working_hours_effect: Kajer shomoy porer din theke lagbe.
confirm_upgrade_employee: Shotti ki ei karmochari ke upgrade korte chao?
confirm_module_switch: Shotti ki module bodlate chao? Ekhoner progress jaabe.
confirm_component_switch: Shotti ki component bodlate chao? Ekhoner progress jaabe.

select_component_develop: Develop korte ekta component choya nao.
manager_tip: Manager karmochari der speed baray ar kothao thaka shomoye niyontron koren.
welcomemail_body:
Shagotom {name}!

Amar naam {investorname}. Ami ekjon Biniyogkari.

Ami tomar procheshto te bishwas kori.

Shuru korte, ekta website toiri koro.

Khub shighro, abar likhbo.

Shuvechhay,
{investorname}
employeequit_body:
Hi,

Ami {companyName} e kaj kore khub khushi chilam. Kintu haal e ami kichu poriborton sesh korechi ar sobar kachh theke nana prostab peyechi.

Khub khorap laagche, kintu ami {companyName} theke bida nite chaichchhi.

Khub bhalo theko,
{name}
lowmoneywarning_body:
Priyo Grahok,

Amar sistem dekhacche je tomar ekhoner balance $500 er niche neme geshe.

Khub shatorkota e taka porikolpona koro nahole tomar rin er projjon porte pare.

Shuvechhay,
Bank
contractcancel_subject: Ei Bishtiri Soh Kora Jaabe Na!
contractcancel_body: Ei ki tomar byabsha korar upay? Aamra ekhane Contract #{number} batil korchi. Jorimaana fee hisab kora hocche. Khub bangna,
loancreated_body:
Hello {companyName},

Chaoya {amount} rin anopatay transfer kora hoyeche.

Shod shaha {interestrate}% par bochor. Rin {duration} din er modhye pherat dite hobe.

Shuvechhay,
Bank
loanpaidout_body:
Hello {companyName},

Amra dekhechi je tumi sapholvabe tomar rin porishod korecho.

Bhobishoter byabsha ke shubhkamonaa janai.

Shuvechhay,
Bank

contract_type_description: Nirdharito Mol: Mol grahok thoktoy. Tumi either raji hote paro ba prottakhyan korte paro. Dor Kasha: Tumi nijer mol pesh korte paro. Protijogi companies o dor hashbe.

competing_other_companies: Tumi ei contract paoar jonno onno companies er shathe protijogita korbe. Ekta pochhhonder mol becho nao.

piracymail_body:
Hi othai,

Amar naam Jonas, ami Startup Company er developer.

Ami lakkho korechi tumi game er ekta unauthorized copy use korcho.

Ami tomar kache anurodh korchi game ta keno kinle bhalo - ei game toiri korte onek shomoy ar porishrom lag geshe.

Dhonyobad,
Jonas

bannerads_description: Graphical banner dekhay, text ads er cheye beshi drishshomaan ar beshi aay.

investor_message_milestone_1:
Hi othai,

Porichy korte bhalo laglo, amar naam Rosy ar ami tomar notun Devhives er advisor.

Ami tomar company te invest korte razze achi.

Shuru korte, ekta website toiri koro tomar Company menu theke.

Abar likhbo.

Shuvechhay,
Rosy
investor_message_milestone_4:
Waah! Tomar notun Landing Page nishchoi {productName} shomparke lokeder uttejiit korbe!

Bhalo korsho!
investor_message_milestone_satisfaction: Darun kaj! Tomar prothom bisheshotto! Upore bame smiley ta dekhecho? Sheita tomar users er tushti dekhay.
investor_message_milestone_more_users: Sundar! Bisheshotto upgrade korar shomoy (potential users baranor jonno) khyal rakho je tumi shubidha upgrade korte parbe naki sudhu mon ulte upgrade korte hobe.
investor_message_milestone_8:
Eto onek users!

Manbo, {investorName} er lokera ektau uttejiit hochhe.

Khub shighro abar likhbo.
investor_message_milestone_first_income: Cholo cholo. Server load er upor najar rakhio. 100% er upor gele users ashbe na.
investor_message_milestone_more_workstat:
Bhalo kaj!

Aay shotto rekho ar jekono deal er shoda dao.
investor_message_milestone_valuation:
Bhalo choice!

Porer milestone er jonno shudhui tomar website e kaj koro.
investor_message_milestone_more_users_2:
Arekta saphollobhabe shompanno milestone!

Alright, amader marketing dekhte hobe.
investor_message_milestone_12:
Ovinandan {productName} er oshodharon briddhi te.

Amader kichu bishoy niye kotha bolte hobe.
investor_message_milestone_13: Darun choice! Notun framework onek ucche bisheshotto level e pohonshaate dey.
investor_message_milestone_14:
Tomar notun hosting shoshthay shagotom!

Ei jaigay tumi rack ar server kinbe ar setup korbe.
investor_message_milestone_15:
Darun! Amar SysAdmin bolche notun servers optimally chalachhe.

Porer lokkhyo holo aaro users aaona.
investor_message_milestone_more_users_3:
Oh dios mio, ovinandan!

{productName} officially laabh korche!

Ami ekhono bischwas korte parchhi na.
investor_message_milestone_higher_cpm:
Khub druto progress korcho, bhalo!

Ami ekhoni conference room theke beriye elam.
investor_message_milestone_16: Biniyogkarira khub uttejiit! Shesh shobar kache shunlam tara flaying private jet e eshe.
investor_message_milestone_17: Developer er kach theke message: Ei khelay ei shesh advisor tip. Khela continue koro nijer ichhamato.
reach_too_small: Khub kom lok e pohonchano geshe. Targeting dhil koro.

investor_message_milestone_5_v2: Obishwaashyo! Ei muhurter jonno jotheshto. Bhobishyote tumi beshi dakkha marketer rakhte parbe. Ekhon website e phire jao ar beshi bisheshotto jog koro! Research Points pabar jonno Gobeshok niyog koro. Shighro, Gobeshona Menu te click kore Bisheshotto Tab theke aaro ekta bisheshotto khojo. Notun bisheshotto khulbe par, website er Bisheshotto Tab theke sei ta jog koro. Opekkhay thakle karmochari der daabi Tonko Tab e dekho.
